columns.fragility_note: DE series structurally shifted by reunification 1990. Pre-1991 = West Germany only.
columns.manipulability_note: Rebasing cycles of industrial production index across Destatis editions.

columns.fragility_note: DE R&D is high and stable; low variance reduces discriminative power of this proxy.
columns.manipulability_note: Industry-funded vs. public R&D split changes across BMBF reports.

columns.fragility_note: Available from late 1990s. DE digital transition was slower than EE.
columns.manipulability_note: Enterprise size threshold (ge10) creates cliff effect; border firms misclassified.

columns.fragility_note: Near-zero pre-2015; sharp growth post-EV adoption curve. Non-linear scaling.
columns.manipulability_note: KTOE conversion depends on EV fleet efficiency assumptions.

columns.fragility_note: DE solar collector area peaked around 2012 then stagnated. Non-monotonic.
columns.manipulability_note: Area vs. thermal output conflation; reported values depend on subsidy programme tracking.

notes: DE trafic pilot (Germany). O=industrial production (reunification break at 1990), R=R&D intensity, I=ICT labour share, demand=road electrification energy (proxy for EV-driven traffic demand), S=solar collector area (symbolic green mobility diffusion). Robust_minmax used throughout; reunification outlier handled by 2-98 percentile clip.
